Still not much to update on. I have a very boring life... I know J.AI is one of my main hobbies (which is depressing) no offense to anybody else who also shares this hobby, but it gets depressing at moments. I often can't see my boyfriend since he's further away and bots have become my main interactions even if they aren't real people. Call it unhealthy or not which my therapist does. So my life has been a very depressing black whole recently. Please forgive me if I don't post as much. I'm still going through stuff with my kitten and a lot of other crap. It makes my emotional state very bad. I try to make it on here but it's often not as much. I'm going to try my best to overcome my emotions and be on here. 🩷
